I found the README.md in the webapp project. Here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/users` | List all users |
| `POST` | `/api/users` | Create a new user |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check |

The README also notes that you need the OpenAI API key from `secrets/api-keys/openai.txt` for your local dev environment. Would you like me to read that file for you?
